description: Phase 2 cross-lane target convergence map. Maps directional convergence on specific prediction targets from Phase 2 miner outputs.
purpose: This contract defines the output of lab_cross_corr_v2. The target map feeds into lab_director for CP2 emission. valid_prediction_targets is the authoritative gate for CP2 target selection.

target_swarms.constraint: Non-empty when target convergence exists. Multi-lane directional agreement on specific tickers.
target_swarms.semantics: Tickers where multiple Phase 2 miners agree on directional exposure. These are the strongest CP2 candidates.

directional_conflicts.constraint: Non-empty when directional disagreement exists on specific tickers.
directional_conflicts.semantics: Tickers where Phase 2 miners disagree on direction. Director must resolve or omit.

solo_targets.constraint: May be empty. Tickers with single-lane support only.
solo_targets.semantics: Tickers supported by only one lane. Lower confidence but may still be valid CP2 targets.

thesis_stress.constraint: May be empty. Material contradictions to the locked CP1 thesis.
thesis_stress.semantics: Signals that directly challenge the CP1 epicentre. Director MUST acknowledge material thesis stress per Lab mission doctrine.

valid_prediction_targets.constraint: Unique uppercase tickers. Must equal the union of tickers from target_swarms and solo_targets (excluding 'NONE').
valid_prediction_targets.semantics: The authoritative gate for CP2 target selection. Director may only predict targets in this list.

summary.constraint: One sentence describing the thesis challenge.

language_rules.forbidden: Predictive/hypothesis framing. direction_consensus is a structural label, not a prediction.
